title: DTO Shape + Lineage Body Mechanics Pack
summary: RF-002/RF-003 package for DTO shape parity, projection parity, and downstream-use audit to prevent double-dipping and DTO drift.
doctrine: DTO contract is language-neutral shape truth.
Projection contract is language-neutral mapping truth.
Semantic operation graph must consume DTO/projection contracts explicitly.
Resolver applies projections and emits projection evidence.
Downstream audit blocks ornamental DTOs, projection bypass, local DTO stitching, and shape matches without lineage.
completionPosture: Ready for resolver/conveyor implementation and conformance validation.
